creator: jhs@jhs.muc.de
text:
Submitter-Id:   current-users
 Originator:     Julian Stacey jhs@freebsd.org
 Confidential:   no
 Synopsis:       email address change
 Severity:       non-critical 
 Priority:       low 
 Category:       bin 
 Release:        current
 Class:          change-request
 Environment:	
 	change is needed as the old email address does not work.
 Description:	-
 How-To-Repeat:	-
 Fix:		-
 	change 
 		Christos Zoulas christos@deshaw.com
 	to
 		Christos Zoulas christos@zoulas.com
 	in all of
 		src/usr.bin/file/MAINT
 		src/usr.bin/file/README
 		src/usr.bin/file/file.1
 		gnu/usr.bin/gzip/THANKS
 		libexec/bootpd/Changes
 		contrib/awk/ChangeLog
 		contrib/amd/AUTHORS
 		contrib/amd/ChangeLog
 	note some are multiple changes per file
 
 -
 Julian Stacey	http://bim.bsn.com/~jhs/
 Munich Unix Consultant.		Free BSD Unix with 3600 packages & sources.
